resolvedQuestions.question: Is the proposed system-deep-loop/runtime/ structural layout correct, or does it create mode/skill identity ambiguity?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Yes, if runtime is kept as non-routable infrastructure under the hub and the unified skill has exactly one graph-metadata identity.

resolvedQuestions.question: Are the Class A and Class B path-repair rules complete and directionally correct for live source files and tests?
resolvedQuestions.answer: The direction rules are correct, but the concrete phase-002 inventory should add replay-graph-from-artifacts, deep-review shims, and a classified runtime-test list.

resolvedQuestions.question: Is the system-spec-kit tooling-borrow repair correctly scoped to phase 002, and are there hidden borrow paths beyond the four planned files?
resolvedQuestions.answer: The four listed borrow edits are phase-002 work, but the plan should add artifact-root.cjs, artifact-root.vitest.ts, and council-playbook-anchor-integrity.vitest.ts for the planned gates.

resolvedQuestions.question: Is the external reference migration plan complete across commands, agents, READMEs, hooks, advisor corpus, skill graph, generated contracts, and examples?
resolvedQuestions.answer: The child 003 plan is directionally complete across the major live surfaces; it should preserve category staging, synchronize advisor codegen/drift guards, regenerate compiled command contracts, and dedupe literal graph-edge duplicates such as cli-opencode.

resolvedQuestions.question: Should fallback-router.ts be wired now for GLM-5.2 to MiMo-v2.5-Pro fallback, or remain optional/deferred?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Keep it optional/deferred for the core merge. If the operator chooses to land it, amend child 004 so model substitution is implemented in fanout-run.cjs or through an explicit pool hook, with a fallback registry/config surface, attribution events, and a forced-failure GLM-to-MiMo integration test.

keyFindings.title: Runtime should be nested infrastructure, not a workflow mode
keyFindings.summary: The hub/runtime split already claims a single workflow identity over a consumed backend; merging runtime under system-deep-loop/runtime preserves that architecture.

keyFindings.title: Fresh-authored unified graph metadata is safer than merging two graph files
keyFindings.summary: Runtime graph metadata currently duplicates edges back to workflows; fresh authoring removes now-internal edges.

keyFindings.title: Class A and Class B path-direction rules are correct
keyFindings.summary: Runtime-to-workflows keeps hop count and deletes the sibling segment; workflows-to-runtime loses one hop and targets runtime/.

keyFindings.title: replay-graph-from-artifacts is an unlisted internal repair site
keyFindings.summary: The council graph replay script hardcodes the runtime upsert path and should be repaired in phase 002 with internal executable paths.

keyFindings.title: Runtime unit-test inventory needs explicit classification
keyFindings.summary: Ten unit-test files mention deep-loop-workflows; the plan should classify code-path fixtures separately from historical text.

keyFindings.title: artifact-root is a hidden system-spec-kit seam
keyFindings.summary: artifact-root.cjs re-exports system-spec-kit/shared/review-research-paths.cjs through a depth-sensitive path and must be repaired in phase 002.

keyFindings.title: test:council needs council-playbook-anchor-integrity path updates
keyFindings.summary: The test:council script includes council-playbook-anchor-integrity, which hardcodes deep-loop-runtime test paths and regexes.

keyFindings.title: External migration plan is directionally complete and category-driven
keyFindings.summary: The 003 plan covers hardcoded constants, structured identity fields, codegen, command assets, docs, graph metadata, examples, advisor corpus, and final verification as separate categories.

keyFindings.title: Advisor projection migration must be synchronized
keyFindings.summary: Python, TypeScript scorer files, and the drift guard all hardcode the merged deep skill identity and registry/projection contract.

keyFindings.title: Hook, CI, plugin, and doctor surfaces are live migration targets
keyFindings.summary: The mirror checker, GitHub workflow, loop guard, and parent-skill doctor checker all contain old deep-loop paths or assumptions.

keyFindings.title: Sibling graph migration should dedupe duplicate cli-opencode edges
keyFindings.summary: The migration should preserve meaningful contextual edges while collapsing literal duplicate targets.

keyFindings.title: fallback-router is shipped and validates fallback graphs
keyFindings.summary: The router validates graph safety and resolves failed models to fallback or fail-fast decisions.

keyFindings.title: router unit tests do not prove fanout GLM/MiMo integration
keyFindings.summary: Pure routing behavior is tested, but there is no forced-failure fanout test for GLM-5.2 to MiMo-v2.5-Pro.

keyFindings.title: fanout-pool only requeues same-label retries
keyFindings.summary: The retry branch increments retryCounts and pushes the same item index back to the queue.

keyFindings.title: model-aware fallback belongs in fanout-run or an explicit pool hook
keyFindings.summary: fanout-run owns lineage model/kind, prompt, command construction, and failure context.

keyFindings.title: GLM to MiMo fallback is optional feature work, not merge-critical
keyFindings.summary: The feature needs a registry/config surface and integration test, and the phase is explicitly P2 optional.

keyFindings.title: Legal convergence reached after all key questions answered
keyFindings.summary: All five key questions are answered, no blocked stop remains, and the minimum iteration count is satisfied.

ruledOutDirections.reason: The registry models public workflow modes only; runtime is backendKind infrastructure and packet-level graph metadata is prohibited.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Blind repo-wide replacement for path coupling
ruledOutDirections.reason: Grep hits mix executable imports, fixture expectations, generated contract inputs, and historical/prose text.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Decouple runtime from system-spec-kit compiler/typeRoots during the merge
ruledOutDirections.reason: Path repair is needed now; full compiler dependency decoupling is separate hardening and would conflate validation failures.
Compiled contracts are generated output; source command assets and router files should be edited, then compile-command-contracts.cjs should regenerate the markdown.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Treat fallback-router wiring as required for merge closeout
ruledOutDirections.reason: The phase is P2 optional and needs config/schema/integration-test work unrelated to rename/path/reference migration.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Wire model substitution directly into the generic pool without a hook
ruledOutDirections.reason: fanout-pool.cjs only owns generic items/retries; model-aware command construction and lineage context live in fanout-run.cjs.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Continue to max-10 after all questions are answered
ruledOutDirections.reason: The configured stop policy is convergence, the minimum iteration count is satisfied, and no blocked stop remains.
